mapper.select: SELECT db.*, CASE WHEN db.is_anonymous = 1 THEN NULL ELSE u.nickname END AS nickname, CASE WHEN db.is_anonymous = 1 THEN NULL ELSE u.avatar END AS avatar FROM drift_bottle db LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON db.user_id = u.id WHERE db.status NOT IN (2, 3) AND db.user_id != #{excludeUserId} AND db.expire_time > NOW() ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 1
SELECT db.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bottle_reply WHERE bottle_id = db.id) AS replyCount FROM drift_bottle db WHERE db.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY db.create_time DESC

SELECT db.*, CASE WHEN db.is_anonymous = 1 THEN NULL ELSE u.nickname END AS nickname, CASE WHEN db.is_anonymous = 1 THEN NULL ELSE u.avatar END AS avatar FROM drift_bottle db INNER JOIN bottle_collection bc ON db.id = bc.bottle_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON db.user_id = u.id WHERE bc.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY bc.create_time DESC
SELECT db.* FROM drift_bottle db WHERE db.id = #{bottleId}
